brief.speaker: carol
brief.text: Group those spans by what it was calling. I want counts.

expected.sql: SELECT called_service, COUNT(*) as call_count FROM spans WHERE tags['service'] = 'chrono-portal-mirror' GROUP BY called_service ORDER BY call_count DESC

hints.text: Carol: 'Query error. Group by the column you\'re selecting — called_service.'
Carol: 'Wrong grouping. I want the downstream services — the called_service column.'
Carol: 'Too many rows. You\'re grouping by something too specific.'
Carol: 'Too few rows. You\'re grouping by something too broad.'
Carol: 'called_service — the column showing what it was talking to.'

success.speaker: carol
success.text:
chrono-archive. chrono-ledger.

Not external endpoints. Not a third-party API. Those are ours. chrono-archive is where we keep founding documents, old client contracts, everything that predates the digital catalog. chrono-ledger is the billing and engagement history going back to — nobody's checked how far back it goes.

Thirty-one calls to chrono-archive. Twelve to chrono-ledger.

It wasn't generating traffic. It was looking for something. In our oldest files.
